/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/flux-doc.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/flux-doc.dir/cli/flux-doc.cpp.o" -o flux-doc  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jnd/qt_projects/fluxscript/build_local:/usr/lib/llvm-21/lib:/usr/local/lib: -Wl,--whole-archive libFluxScript.so -Wl,--no-whole-archive /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libLLVM-21.so /usr/local/lib/libngspice.so
